name: CulinaryOps
tagline: Back-of-house analytics and operations management for food service businesses
description: CulinaryOps is the numbers side of running a kitchen — labor cost, food cost percentage, waste tracking, vendor management, purchase orders, and live KPI dashboards. It gives operators the financial visibility they need without hiring a consultant.
forWho: General managers, kitchen managers, food service consultants, and operators who need to actually understand where their money is going. If you've ever stared at a food cost spreadsheet wondering why the numbers don't add up, this is for you.
story: Every GM I've ever worked with was drowning in spreadsheets. Food cost calculations done by hand. Vendor invoices in a pile. Labor tracked in a notebook. CulinaryOps came from watching smart operators do important work with terrible tools. I wanted a dashboard that showed you at a glance: are we profitable today? Where did we lose money this week? What's our waste trending? It connects to CulinaryOS for live data, but runs standalone for consultants and managers who don't control the whole stack.
details: Next.js 14 + TypeScript frontend, Supabase backend. The culinaryops-mcp server exposes all KPIs and reports to AI assistants — meaning a manager can ask in plain English 'what was our food cost last week compared to budget?' and get a real answer. Standalone SaaS with its own subscription tier, or bundled with CulinaryOS for full-stack operators.
